data.title: 关于跨平台默认账号设置页面开放的通知
data.summary: [Blue Archive Default Account Settings Page Open Notice] Sensei, the Blue Archive Default Account Se
data.body:
[Blue Archive Default Account Settings Page Open Notice]

Sensei, the Blue Archive Default Account Settings Page is now open!

From the webpage below, you can easily select which game data to play between your Nexon account and Steam account.

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3100759

#BlueArchive

![GyxcoVmacAMhAl1.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/443/RYlUVBnsxQ9IfOd5iKCJ24ii0HAiPmmu.jpg)
